description: Trigger SDK regeneration for a specific package name with private registry support. arg0: package manager (yarn, npm). arg1: full package name. arg2: npm config file path (e.g. '.npmrc-renovate'). Only supported for npm and Yarn 1 via NPM_CONFIG_USERCONFIG; for Yarn 2+, configure hostRules instead (see https://docs.renovatebot.com/getting-started/private-packages/#yarn-2).
